caption:
Just added a new fan favorite to my summer set list! I can’t to perform this cover live and hear you singing along ☺️
#singer #teenartist #acousticguitar #

I love this song. I wanted to write a song about the cutest dog ever but as I was writing it the song morphed into a story about an old fashioned Hollywood starlet. I saw her as a neglected child from an affluent home who set out to become a star. She rises to fame and then a scandal ruins her reputation. I can’t wait to hear what you think!
#singer #teenartist #songwriter #newmusic #originalmusic

I got the Hunger Games books for Christmas and finished them by New Year’s Day. As soon as I discovered there were songs in the books, I knew I was going to learn one. What drew me to the ballad of Lucy Gray Baird was not just Rachel Zegler’s outstanding performance but how something so simple can be so captivating. I hope you like it.
#singer #teenartist #acousticguitar

For the past 5 1/2 years I have lived abroad and traveled a lot. Living this life means meeting lots of new people and making lots of new friends. I have a best friend name Lyla who travels a lot too. One night on a zoom call at 10pm we composed this song about what it’s like meeting new friends abroad. How you can be total strangers, but then in such a short time, it’s like you were never strangers! This is, “Strangers,” re-recorded without the jet ski! 
#teenartist #singer #songwriter #newmusic #originalmusic

Destroyed is a song I wrote about a very difficult friendship. Even though the events that inspired this song happened a long time ago, it’s still something I think about very day. Writing this song was a way to process my feelings and put it behind me. I have shared this song before but since then, I’ve done some work on the lyrics. I am trying to improve as a writer and have changed a few lines to include more details… more showing less telling. I’d love to know what you think! 

#teenartist #songwriter #newmusic #originalmusic

This is an original I wrote about a particularly hard friendship. I hope it resonates for you. 💚

#singer #teenartist #songwriter #newmusic #originalmusic

I love this song because it makes me think of my best friends and all that we will do to support one another. I hope you enjoy it!
#singer #teenartist #acousticguitar

Our Song by Taylor Swift  is the first cover song I ever learned. It’s so much fun to play. I hope you like it! 

#singer #teenartist #acousticguitar

Friendship has brought so much joy into my life. My relationship with my friends is everything. Here’s a song I wrote celebrating the importance of friendship. I hope you like it!
#singer #songwriter #newmusic #originalmusic #teenartist

Destroyed is a song I wrote about a very difficult friendship. Even though the events that inspired this song happened a long time ago, it’s still something I think about very day. Writing this song was a way to put it behind me and I’m so happy I can finally share it. It’s a song I’m really proud of. I hope you enjoy it.
#singer #songwriter #newmusic #originalmusic #teenartist

For the past 5 1/2 years I have lived abroad and traveled a lot. Living this life means meeting lots of new people and making lots of new friends. I have a best friend name Lyla who travels a lot too. One night on a zoom call at 10pm we composed this song about what it’s like meeting new friends abroad. How you can be total strangers, but then in such a short time, it’s like you were never strangers! This is, “Strangers,”  I hope you enjoy it.
#singer #songwriter #newmusic #originalmusic #teenartist

You and Dragonfly is a song I wrote about the complicated evolution of friendship. We recorded it on my Grandfather’s piano, the one my Mom and Aunt grew up playing. I hope you like it! Let me know what you think ✨

#songwriter #singer #newmusic #originalmusic #teensongwriter

Soul Sisters is dedicated to my soul sister, a friend I have had since I was a baby. I hope you like it and can please send it to a soul sister of your own. ✨

#songwriter #singer #newmusic #originalmusic #teenartist #acousticguitar

Best Friends is the first song I ever wrote. I was eight years old and had no idea what I was doing. Thanks to my phenomenal mentors and a new perspective, I was able to turn it into something I am proud of. This is dedicated to my best friends. I hope you like it. Love your sea-swept songwriter, Sage. 💖
